_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Daemon chaos / fault-injection test layer

steps.description: Fault-injection harness: tests/integration/daemon_chaos/harness.py + conftest.py + chaos_daemon fixture + 5 named deterministic injection hooks + determinism meta-test
Scenario 1: test_worktree_setup_mid_failure.py — worktree-setup mid-failure -> terminal-error, no zombie dir, batch not poisoned
Scenario 2: test_fix_cycle_cap_exhaustion.py — fix-cycle counter caps at MAX_FIX_CYCLE exactly; daemon recovers and picks next item
Scenario 3: test_agent_stall_recovery.py — agent stalls past IW_CORE_STALL_THRESHOLD; daemon detects, kills, routes per policy
Scenario 4: test_squash_merge_conflict.py — squash-merge conflict fails cleanly; main not half-merged; F-00084 dual-path
Scenario 5: test_migration_rebase_failure.py — migration_rebase.py failure detected, item marked, alembic_version unchanged, worktree preserved
Wire-up: Makefile daemon-chaos-smoke + daemon-chaos-full targets + .github/workflows/daemon-chaos.yml + skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md canonical 9th gate + iw sync-skills --force iw-workflow

Docs + tracker: TESTS_ENHANCEMENT.md v1.4 (row 4.3 DONE) + IW_AI_Core_Testing_Strategy.md Layer 9 + IW_AI_Core_Daemon_Design.md cross-link + skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md harness section + iw sync-skills --force iw-ai-core-testing
CodeReview: per-agent review of all 8 Backend implementation steps (S01..S08)
CodeReview_Final: cross-step global review — harness API agreement, smoke-subset agreement across all consumers, test-only scope, Invariant 10 (gate not on own manifest)
QV: Assertion scanner (forbid new vacuous tests)
QV: Diff coverage (new/changed lines must be well-covered)
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
